sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sqid (id UInt32, encoded_id String);
INSERT INTO test_sqid (id, encoded_id) VALUES (1, sqidEncode(1));
INSERT INTO test_sqid (id, encoded_id) VALUES (2, sqidEncode(2));
UPDATE test_sqid SET encoded_id = sqidEncode(id) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, encoded_id FROM test_sqid WHERE encoded_id = sqidEncode(2);
